articles.title: How Hezbollah’s low-cost drones are reshaping the battlefield as Israel scrambles to adapt
articles.description: Hezbollah's deployment of cheap, fibre-optic drones is presenting a significant challenge to Israeli forces in southern Lebanon. These low-tech, untraceable devices, unlike GPS-guided ones, are difficult to counter, forcing the Israeli military to adapt its tactics. The group is manufacturing these drones domestically, exploiting perceived weaknesses in Israeli defenses.

articles.title: Maharashtra HSC result 2026: Steps to check scorecards via DigiLocker, UMANG, SMS and official portals
articles.description: The Maharashtra State Board will release the HSC Result 2026 through multiple platforms, ensuring easy access for students. Results can be checked via official websites, DigiLocker, the UMANG app, and SMS services. DigiLocker allows secure access to digital marksheets using Aadhaar-linked login, while UMANG integrates government services for result viewing. Students must enter accurate credentials as per their hall tickets. Online marksheets are provisional and valid for admissions, with original certificates to be collected later from respective institutions.
